thesis_summary: Long bias remains actionable only if the open defends 27130-27150 and reclaims 27210 before late morning.

checks.label: Opening demand holds above 27130
checks.rationale: A break below 27130 would invalidate the defended-demand reclaim setup and shift toward trend-down risk.

checks.label: Open forms dip-then-reclaim or rotation
checks.rationale: The forecast depends on absorption after an opening shakeout, not immediate downside continuation.

checks.label: Price reclaims 27210 by 10:00
checks.rationale: 27210 is the open/gap-rotation reference; failure to reclaim keeps sellers in control.

checks.label: Price holds above VWAP by late morning
checks.rationale: Above-VWAP acceptance confirms the reclaim is actionable instead of only a short-covering bounce.

checks.label: Late-morning pullbacks hold above 27180
checks.rationale: A higher low above 27180 is needed for afternoon continuation toward 27320-27410.
